title: Flaky Greek Beef Stir-fry
description: A herbal and flaky Greek dish featuring beef brisket in a diabetic-friendly stir-fry that pairs perfectly with brunch.

ingredients.name: Greek Yogurt Sauce
ingredients.notes: Low-fat or regular, based on preference

instructions: Season the beef brisket with salt and pepper. Place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 10-15 minutes or until nicely browned, then reduce heat to 275°F and continue cooking until fully tender (about 45-60 minutes). Let cool slightly before slicing thin.
In a large skillet over medium-high heat, add olive oil. Add sliced onions and cook for about 3 minutes until translucent.
Add red bell pepper, green bell pepper, zucchini slices, and the cooked beef brisket to the skillet. Stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
Drizzle the Greek yogurt sauce over the stir-fried mixture. Mix well to combine.
Sprinkle fresh herbs on top of the dish before serving.
Serve hot as a side dish with crusty bread.
